calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Damiel P. Lillis, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, RICKE ASSOCIATES PTE. LTD., a business organization.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) EXIGEN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-25 dismissed without prejudice.
Declarations filed in support of Request for Default Prove up are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

The Court awards Plaintiff the following:
a. Under the Advisory & Confidential Information Agreement, the principat amount of $53,297.00 in unpaid quarterly payments for Q4 2011, Q1 2012, Q2 2012, Q3, 2012, and a prorated portion of Q4 20112;
b. $8,136.73 in interest accrued as of October 31, 2013
c. $650 in recoverable costs.
Accordingly, the Court awards Plaintiff a total of $.
The Court further awards Judgment for Plaintiff Ricke Associates Pte. Ltd. in the total amount of $62,083.73 against defendant Exigen Capital Management, LLC. The Court further awards post-judgment interest at the legal rate from the date this Judgment is entered until satisfied.
Judgment signed in open court.

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAMIEN P. LILLIS OF SMITH LILLIS PITHA LLP, TEL. NO. 814-0411 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PLAINTIFF BROUGHT TO THE HEARING ALL THE DOCUMENTS THAT WAS ADDRESSED IN THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF RICKE ASSOCIATES PTE. LTD'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWING IN THE AMOUNT OF $60,059.00. BOND TO BE POSTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,000.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
